rulings.Case Title: IN RE: FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 09, 2016, line 1. RESPONDENT CYRUS LAFARRE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT's Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and produce admissible competent evidence as to the recordation of exemption. Automatic exemption does not apply to foreclosures. Spencer v. Lowery (1191) 235 Cal.App.3d 1636.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 09, 2016, line 4. rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JENIFER EATON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Compel Defendant Masai Bradford'S Responses To Pltf'S Request For Admissions And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 09, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion To Compel Defendant Masai Bradford'S Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Admissions And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition.
